query: what are the cost for breast reconstructions
answer:
Breast reconstructions are covered when necessary due to disease, illness or injury.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Mastectomy and Breast Reconstruction | Office and clinic visits | Kinwell Clinics: $0 copay per visit, deductible waived  All Other Non-Specialist: $25 copay per visit, deductible waived  All Other Specialist: $40 copay per visit, deductible waived | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Mastectomy and Breast Reconstruction | Surgery and other professional services | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Mastectomy and Breast Reconstruction | Inpatient facility care | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Mastectomy And Breast Reconstruction | Benefits are provided for mastectomy necessary due to disease, illness or injury. This benefit covers: • Reconstruction of the breast on which mastectomy was performed • Surgery and reconstruction of the other breast to produce a similar appearance • Physical complications of all stages of mastectomy, including lymphedema treatment and supplies • Inpatient care Planned hospital admissions require prior authorization, see Prior Authorization for details. |
source: Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan
